type_definitions.name: RenderContractMap
type_definitions.description: Primary port (application_service trait) driving the contract-map render workflow. CLI and future adapters depend on this trait, not on the concrete interactor. Pre-exists from previous track. Declared with action=reference (structure unchanged).

type_definitions.name: RenderContractMapInteractor
type_definitions.description: Interactor implementing RenderContractMap by composing CatalogueLoader, domain render_contract_map free function, and ContractMapWriter. Phase 2 extends this type with a declares_application_service field (value: RenderContractMap) so the Contract Map renderer emits a -.impl.-> edge from this interactor to RenderContractMap (IN-02, L3 isolation fix, AC-02). The field is a Phase 2 catalogue schema extension — not yet in catalogue_codec.rs Interactor variant. Declared with action=modify to record the intended structural change against baseline.

informal_grounds.summary: declares_application_service=RenderContractMap field not yet in catalogue_codec.rs Interactor variant; Yellow expected until IN-02 codec support is merged

type_definitions.name: RenderContractMapCommand
type_definitions.description: Command input for RenderContractMap::execute carrying TrackId, optional kind_filter, and optional layer_filter. Pre-exists from previous track. Declared with action=reference (structure unchanged).

type_definitions.name: RenderContractMapOutput
type_definitions.description: DTO reporting rendered_layer_count and total_entry_count after a successful render. Pre-exists from previous track. Declared with action=reference (structure unchanged).

informal_grounds.summary: Output DTO for RenderContractMap::execute; carries rendered_layer_count and total_entry_count. Declared prior to Phase 2 spec element authoring with a dedicated anchor; reachable via IN-02 (execute method signature context).

type_definitions.name: RenderContractMapError
type_definitions.description: Error variants surfaced by RenderContractMap primary port. Pre-exists from previous track. No new variants in this track. Declared with action=reference.

informal_grounds.summary: Error type for RenderContractMap primary port; variants map loader and writer failures. Declared prior to Phase 2 spec element authoring with a dedicated anchor; reachable via IN-02 (execute method returns this error).
